title: PHP Developer - Remote
description: Job Title: PHP Developer Job Type: Contractor Location: Remote (US and Canada) Job Summary Join our customer's team as a skilled PHP Developer, contributing your back-end expertise to an innovative AI agent project. You’ll play a pivotal role training AI models by leveraging your deep understanding of PHP and Laravel in a distributed, cutting-edge environment. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain robust PHP applications using Laravel. Collaborate closely with AI model trainers to structure data and workflows for AI training processes. Contribute to the architecture and implementation of scalable, high-performance back-end systems. Analyze requirements and translate them into efficient, reliable code solutions. Participate in code reviews, ensuring adherence to best practices and high-quality standards. Communicate effectively across written and verbal channels within a remote, collaborative team. Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve complex back-end issues during AI model training cycles. Required Skills And Qualifications 3+ of experience with PHP and the Laravel framework. (Open to other backend technology) Proven ability to develop, test, and deploy production-grade applications. Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, especially in a remote work setup. Strong grasp of software engineering best practices, including version control, testing, and documentation. Experience with back-end or full-stack development outside of traditional React/Node.js frameworks. Self-motivated and capable of working autonomously while contributing to team objectives. Demonstrated experience working on data-driven or AI-related projects is a strong plus. Preferred Qualifications Background in training or fine-tuning AI/ML models. Previous experience with distributed systems or cloud environments. Familiarity with advanced PHP tooling or Laravel ecosystem extensions.

title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: Full Stack Yazılım Geliştirici Stajyeri (Ücretsiz Staj)
description: Notlandır, sınav kağıdı değerlendirme süreçlerini yapay zeka ile dijitalleştiren ve eğitim kurumlarının operasyonel yükünü azaltmayı hedefleyen bir eğitim teknolojileri girişimidir. Akıllı değerlendirme, analiz ve merkezi sınav yönetimi sistemleri geliştiriyoruz. Gerçek bir startup ortamında deneyim kazanmak ve aktif geliştirilen bir üründe görev almak isteyen Full Stack Yazılım Geliştirici Stajyeri arıyoruz. İş Tanımı • Ölçeklenebilir web uygulamaları geliştirmek ve sürdürmek • Node.js ve Express.js kullanarak backend servisleri geliştirmek • React ve JavaScript ile kullanıcı dostu arayüzler oluşturmak • REST API ve üçüncü parti servis entegrasyonları yapmak • Uygulamaları performans, hız ve ölçeklenebilirlik açısından optimize etmek • Temiz, sürdürülebilir ve dokümante edilmiş kod yazmak • Mevcut sistemlerde hata ayıklama ve iyileştirme çalışmaları yapmak • Code review süreçlerine katılmak ve ekip çalışmalarına destek olmak Aranan Nitelikler • Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerde öğrenci ya da yeni mezun olmak • Full Stack geliştirme konusunda temel bilgi veya proje deneyimi • JavaScript bilgisine sahip olmak • Node.js ve Express.js konusunda temel seviyede bilgi sahibi olmak • React.js ile geliştirme deneyimi bulunması • RESTful API yapıları hakkında temel bilgi sahibi olmak • İlişkisel veritabanları konusunda temel bilgi sahibi olmak • Git ve versiyon kontrol sistemlerine aşina olmak Tercih Sebepleri • Microservices mimarisi hakkında temel bilgi • Docker ve Kubernetes araçlarına aşinalık • CI/CD süreçleri hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak Stajyer Ne Kazanacak? • Gerçek bir startup ortamında aktif geliştirme deneyimi • Yapay zeka destekli bir ürün üzerinde çalışma fırsatı • Esnek ve gelişim odaklı çalışma ortamı • Yazılım mimarisi ve modern geliştirme süreçlerinde pratik deneyim • Performansa bağlı referans ve mentorluk desteği 📩 Başvuru için CV’nizi ve varsa GitHub / portföy bağlantınızı paylaşabilirsiniz.

title: Backend Developer
description: Dijital Güvenlik Sektöründe Kariyer Fırsatı! Sen de dijital güvenlik sektöründe kariyer yapmak ve parlak bir geleceğe adım atmak ister misin? ArkSigner, e-imza ve Kimlik Doğrulama çözümleriyle teknoloji sektöründe lider konumda olan dinamik bir şirkettir. 2015 yılında başlayan yolculuğumuz bugün Türkiye’nin en büyük bankaları, holdingleri, finans kuruluşları ve kamu kurumlarıyla devam ediyor. Yazılım ve donanım ürünlerimizle dijital güvenlik alanında yeni standartlar belirlemeyi amaçlıyoruz. Tüm mevzuatlara uygun, yerli imkanlarla geliştirilmiş elektronik imza ve kimlik doğrulama çözümlerimizle Türkiye’de ve globalde güvenliği yeniden tanımlıyoruz. Buradan hareketle şirketimizin Ankara ofisinde görevlendirilmek üzere çalışma arkadaşımızı ekibimize katılmaya davet ediyoruz! Aranan Nitelikler: Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerinden mezun, .NET teknolojileriyle yazılım geliştirme konusunda 3-4 yıl deneyimli, C# ile hem .NET Framework 4.7.2 hem de .NET Core 6.0 / 8.0 / 9.0 sürümlerinde uygulama geliştirmiş, MSSQL veritabanı, LINQ to Entity ve Entity Framework konularında deneyimli, REST API ve SOAP servisleri geliştirme ve entegrasyonu konularında bilgi sahibi, MVC mimarisi ile çalışmış, JavaScript ve jQuery konularında tecrübeli, SOLID prensipleri ve Nesne Yönelimli Programlama (OOP) konularına hakim, Design patterns (tasarım desenleri) konusunda uygulama tecrübesi olan, RabbitMQ ve Redis ile mesajlaşma ve önbellekleme sistemlerinde çalışmış, Windows Services geliştirme ve yönetimi konularında deneyim sahibi.

title: Senior Full Stack React Native Developer
description: Company Description easyApps specializes in building and distributing AI-powered consumer applications. Our mission is to leverage cutting-edge AI technologies to enhance user experiences and create innovative solutions. We are committed to delivering high-performing, user-friendly applications that address everyday challenges. Join our team and contribute to building the next generation of intelligent apps. Role: Senior Full Stack React Native Developer We're looking for an experienced full stack developer to join us in building, maintaining, and shipping our consumer mobile apps. The person will work across multiple apps simultaneously — fixing bugs, handling maintenance on both mobile and backend, setting up new apps from scratch, and taking active part in their development. Required Strong proficiency in React Native (both CLI and Expo) Strong proficiency in TypeScript Experience with Zustand, React Query, and MMKV Experience implementing push notifications and deep linking (FCM, APNs, universal links) Experience with in-app purchase and subscription flows (RevenueCat or native IAP) Solid backend experience with NestJS, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and Firebase Auth Hands-on experience with Google Cloud, including server and database management (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Secret Manager) Experience setting up and managing CI/CD pipelines using EAS Build and/or Fastlane Hands-on experience publishing and managing apps on the App Store and Google Play Store — including TestFlight, internal testing tracks, store listings, and handling review rejections (essential, as all our apps are released through these channels) Proficiency with Git and GitHub Ability to translate designs from Figma (or similar tools) into production-ready interfaces Strong Plus Experience with Sentry or Crashlytics for crash monitoring Experience integrating analytics tools such as Adjust and Firebase Experience with OTA updates (EAS Update or CodePush) Testing experience with Jest, Detox, or Maestro What the Role Looks Like Day-to-Day Working across several consumer apps in parallel Bug fixes and ongoing maintenance on both the mobile and backend side Setting up the architecture and codebase for new apps Contributing to feature development from concept to release Profile We're Looking For A hands-on, experienced full stack mobile developer who is comfortable owning features end-to-end — from backend API to deployed app on the stores. We're not looking for someone who only knows part of this stack; familiarity with all of the technologies listed above is required.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Apilex is a global legaltech company building AI that transforms how legal professionals work. Powered by a proprietary database of 200M+ court decisions and legal documents, our platform delivers semantic search, contract analysis, and automated legal drafting — turning days of legal research into seconds. Since our founding, we've grown to a team of 90+ people and established ourselves as Türkiye's leading AI legal assistant. Now, we're taking it global — expanding into France, Germany, Brasil, Italy and Spain to compete in the billion-dollar legaltech market. What sets us apart? We don't use off-the-shelf AI. We build domain-specific, closed-circuit AI models with multi-layered verification systems that eliminate hallucinations and deliver answers backed by real citations and legal reasoning. Every feature we ship changes how lawyers work, not in theory, but in practice. We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to design and scale the high-traffic microservices that form the backbone of our global legal AI platform. Key Responsibilities Scalable Architecture: Design and develop high-traffic, scalable microservice architectures to support our expanding global footprint. Code Excellence: Raise the bar on code quality by leading code review processes and implementing best practices across the backend. Technical Leadership: Provide mentorship to the engineering team and guide technical decision-making for complex features. System Integration: Build and maintain reliable integrations between core services, AI agents, and large-scale data stores. Performance Optimization: Ensure system reliability and low latency across distributed services through efficient caching and messaging strategies. What We’re Looking For 5+ years of backend experience building and scaling Java and Spring Boot applications in production Strong foundation in software architecture design including OOP and SOLID principles across various scales Hands-on experience with both PostgreSQL and MongoDB including the ability to design hybrid data architectures Deep knowledge of Elasticsearch or similar technologies for high-performance search and indexing Practical experience with messaging systems like RabbitMQ or Kafka and in-memory caching with Redis Solid understanding of WebSocket and real-time streaming architectures for distributed environments Direct experience with cloud platforms and building automated CI/CD pipelines Ability to ship high-quality code and iterate quickly rather than waiting for perfect conditions Why join us? We're building the AI that lawyers rely on every day, across every area of their practice — the core of how thousands of legal professionals research, draft, and reason. You'll join a team solving one of the hardest challenges in AI: making it reliable enough for high-stakes, real-world decisions. We're scaling across Europe and Latin America, shipping fast, and setting the bar for what reliable AI looks like in legal. Whatever your role, your work here will be visible and meaningful. We're one of the fastest-growing AI companies in Türkiye, and we're looking for ambitious people who want to build the future of legal technology on a global stage. This is Apilex. AI for Legal. Join us.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Turkey - Istanbul Role Overview We're looking for a talented Frontend-Focused Full Stack Developer to join Bolt Insight as a key member of our growing engineering team. This is an exciting opportunity for someone who wants to own the frontend of a genuinely innovative AI-powered platform — building the interfaces through which clients and consumers connect in real time. You'll be responsible for architecting and delivering intuitive, high-performance UIs, working closely with design, product, and backend engineers to bring complex data and AI capabilities to life. You'll have real ownership over frontend decisions, the autonomy to shape how our technology looks and feels, and the scope to grow with us as we scale. Responsibilities Frontend Architecture & Development Own the frontend architecture and drive consistency, scalability, and best practices across the UI codebase. Build responsive, pixel-perfect, and user-friendly interfaces with React. Design and implement scalable component libraries and frontend systems within a monorepo structure. Build and maintain real-time UI features. Monitor frontend performance and troubleshoot production issues. Collaboration & Integration Collaborate with backend engineers to consume and shape APIs. Contribute to backend services using Node.js frameworks when needed. Work with design teams to translate wireframes and prototypes into production-ready code. Participate in code reviews and champion frontend best practices. AI-Augmented Development Use AI coding assistants (Copilot, Cursor, Claude, etc.) as a natural part of your daily workflow. Accelerate coding, debugging, and code review with AI tools. Write effective prompts to generate, refactor, or explain code. Apply critical review to AI-generated output before shipping. Automate repetitive dev tasks — from scaffolding components to writing tests and generating docs. Innovation & Growth Stay current with emerging frontend technologies and AI/ML tools. Identify opportunities to improve tooling, processes, and developer experience. Contribute to the broader engineering culture through knowledge sharing and continuous improvement. Key Deliverables & Performance Metrics UI Quality: Deliver interfaces that are fast, accessible, and consistent across the product. Component Systems: Build and maintain reusable component libraries that accelerate team velocity. Collaboration: Ensure smooth integration between frontend and backend through well-shaped APIs and clear communication. Engineering Standards: Uphold code quality, documentation, and best practices across the codebase. Requirements Technical Skills 4+ years of experience in React and modern frontend development. Strong proficiency in TypeScript. Experience with modern state management and server-state management patterns. Hands-on experience with component libraries and utility-first CSS frameworks. Solid understanding of RESTful APIs — consuming and integrating them. Familiarity with real-time communication (WebSockets). Familiarity with backend development using Node.js frameworks. Understanding of SQL and NoSQL databases at a working level. Experience working in monorepo environments. Proficiency with Git version control. Comfortable using AI coding assistants as part of daily development workflow. Nice to Have Experience with LLM APIs and AI SDK integrations. Hands-on experience building or integrating RAG systems. Familiarity with vector databases or agentic frameworks. Understanding of prompt engineering and LLM evaluation techniques. Experience with embedding models and semantic search. Docker and containerisation. CI/CD pipelines. Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure). Testing frameworks and TDD practices. Notes This job description and person specification are an outline of the tasks, responsibilities, and outcomes required of the role and are not intended to be an exhaustive list. The job holder will carry out any other duties that may reasonably be required by their Team Lead. The job description and person specification may be reviewed on an ongoing basis in accordance with the changing needs of the team or the employee. Why Work for Bolt Insight? At Bolt Insight, We’re a Vibrant And Growing Start-up Mentality Business With a Passionate Team That Thrives On Innovation And Collaboration. Here’s What You Can Expect When You Join Us Remote working and the flexibility to work in a nomadic way – Enjoy the best of both worlds, balancing work and life your way. Flexible working environment – We trust you to manage your time and work in a way that suits you best. Private Medical Insurance - Your health and well-being are important to us, and we’ve got you covered. Business referral bonus – If you know someone who’s a great fit for the team, we’ll reward you for it! Employee referral bonus – You get the chance to shape our team and be rewarded for bringing great people onboard. Virtual or local team gatherings – Whether online or in person, we love to connect and celebrate our successes together. In-house recognition awards – We celebrate our ‘lightning bolts’ (those who go above and beyond) and show our appreciation for hard work! Annual Bonus System – If the company meets its targets, you’ll receive a bonus payment of up to two months’ salary! We win together. At Bolt, curiosity, creativity and passion matter most. If you’re excited about shaping the future of research and contributing to a culture built on innovation and collaboration, we’d love to hear from you. Bolt Insight is an equal opportunities employer committed to creating and maintaining an inclusive, diverse and professional workplace for all. We strive to create a welcoming environment where all individuals, no matter their background or identity, feel valued and supported. If you have specific requirements throughout the recruitment process, please reach out to a member of our HR team who will make the appropriate adjustments. Apply today and join a dynamic, international team driving innovation across borders!

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: About Vacayou Vacayou is a travel and wellness platform connecting adventurous travelers with curated experiences around the globe. As a subsidiary of TripFusion, we combine cutting-edge travel technology with inspiring content to deliver a best-in-class user experience. Our team is lean, ambitious, and passionate about building products that help people live more fulfilling lives through travel. The Role We are looking for a talented and versatile Full Stack Developer to join our remote-first engineering team. In this role, you will maintain and enhance our current Joomla 3-based platform while simultaneously driving the transition to a modern, scalable CMS. You will work across the full stack, building React-powered front-end experiences and architecting robust back-end services, and you will play a central role in shaping the next chapter of Vacayou's technology. Key Responsibilities Platform Maintenance & Development Maintain, debug, and extend the existing Joomla 3 website, including custom components, modules, and plugins. Build and improve React-based front-end features, including search, booking flows, content displays, and user dashboards. Integrate third-party APIs (travel inventory, payment processors, analytics, CRM) into both the front and back end. Optimize site performance, SEO, and Core Web Vitals scores across all pages. CMS Migration Leadership Audit the existing Joomla 3 architecture: content structure, custom extensions, integrations, and SEO configuration, to produce a comprehensive migration brief. Design the migration strategy, including content mapping, URL redirect plans, staging environment setup, and rollback procedures. Lead execution of the migration, preserving all existing SEO equity and content integrity. Document the new architecture and onboard internal stakeholders and content editors. Engineering Excellence Write clean, well-tested, and maintainable code following agreed-upon standards and code review processes. Participate in sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives within an agile workflow. Required Qualifications 5+ years of professional full stack development experience. Hands-on experience with Joomla 3, including custom extension development. Hands-on experience with React / Next.js. Understanding of technical SEO in migrations: 301 redirect strategy, canonical tags, sitemap handling, crawl/index control (e.g., Google Search Console) Strong written and verbal English communication skills, you will work with a globally distributed team. Bonus Knowledge of PHP. Familiarity with SEO best practices, including structured data, sitemaps, and technical on-page SEO. Prior work in the travel, e-commerce, or media/publishing industry. Experience with Elasticsearch or Algolia for site search. Turkish language skills are a plus but not required. What We Offer | Remote-First Culture Work from anywhere in Turkey (or beyond) with flexible hours built around your productivity. | Travel Perks Discounted access to Vacayou experiences and Tripfusion travel benefits for you and your family. | | --- | --- | | High Impact Role Help shape the architecture of a growing platform used by travelers worldwide — your decisions matter. | Modern Tooling We invest in the tools, cloud infrastructure, and developer experience you need to do your best work. | | Competitive Compensation Salary benchmarked to local Turkey market rates with performance bonuses and equity consideration. | Learning & Growth Annual learning budget, conference attendance support, and a culture of continuous improvement. | ﻿ How to Apply We review applications on a rolling basis and move quickly with strong candidates. To apply, please send the following to careers@vacayou.com with the subject line "Full Stack Developer – [Your Name]": Your CV or LinkedIn profile. A brief cover note (3–5 sentences) describing your most relevant CMS migration or Joomla experience. Links to 2–3 projects or repositories you are proud of. We look forward to hearing from you.
